allow: Bash(uvx --no-project --from "py-mini-racer" python -c "import py_mini_racer; ctx = py_mini_racer.MiniRacer\(\); import re; html=open\('index.html'\).read\(\); js=re.search\(r'<script>\(.*?\)</script>', html, re.S\).group\(1\); ctx.eval\('var window={},document={addEventListener:function\(\){}};' + js\); print\('OK · executed in mini-racer V8'\)")
